name: DEWALT 20V MAX Cordless Jigsaw, Tool Only (DCS331B)

specs.Orbital: 4-position orbital action for aggressive or fine cutting
specs.Application: Cuts wood up to 5.5", aluminum up to 1"

whatWorks: The four-position orbital action selector is the most useful feature for versatility. Position 0 delivers a straight reciprocating cut for fine finish work in laminates and veneers; positions 1 through 3 add progressively more aggressive oval stroke motion that removes material faster in softwood framing and rough cuts. Most users find position 2 the ideal general-purpose setting.

Tool-free blade change via the front-mounted release lever handles all T-shank blades — the industry standard — without a wrench or hex key. Blade swaps take under ten seconds, which matters when you're switching between a fine-tooth blade for plywood and a bimetal blade for cutting metal conduit.

The cast aluminum shoe (base plate) distributes the cutting force more evenly than plastic shoes on budget jigsaws, reducing vibration at the cut surface and improving line-following accuracy. The 45-degree bevel capacity with the bevel lock gives clean angled cuts for trim carpentry and countertop scribing.

Variable speed from 0 to 3,000 SPM means you can dial in the right speed for the material — slow for acrylic and tile (with appropriate blades), fast for softwood. The 3,000 SPM top speed is brisk enough to cut 3/4-inch pine cleanly in a single smooth pass.
worthKnowing: This is a tool-only product — no battery or charger included. You need a 20V MAX battery to use it. If you don't already own 20V MAX tools, budget an additional $60–$100 CAD for a compatible battery and charger, or buy the DCK combo kit that includes batteries.

At 5.5 inches maximum depth of cut in wood, the DCS331B is suited for dimensional lumber and sheet goods up to about 2× material. For cutting through doubled 2×4 framing or stacked lumber, a reciprocating saw or a deeper-cutting jigsaw is the better tool.

Blade drift — where the cut wanders off a straight line — is a function of blade quality and technique more than the tool itself. Using quality T-shank blades (Bosch T101B for fine cuts, T144D for fast cuts) and letting the tool lead without forcing makes a substantial difference in cut quality.

The orbital action setting affects blade life: position 3 cuts faster but wears blades more quickly, and leaves a rougher edge. For finish cuts in hardwood or laminate, position 0 or 1 extends blade life significantly and produces a cleaner edge.

commonComplaints.title: No battery included at this price…
commonComplaints.body: Tool-only at $199 feels steep when you add the cost of a battery. The pricing makes sense as a platform add-on, but if you're starting fresh the combo kit is a better deal.

commonComplaints.title: Blade drift on long cuts needs technique…
commonComplaints.body: The first time I tried a 4-foot rip cut in plywood, it curved. Turns out you have to use a guide or go slowly. Not a jigsaw thing — a user technique thing. Just be warned.

commonComplaints.title: 5.5-inch depth is the limit…
commonComplaints.body: Hit the limit trying to cut through a 4×4 post. Got about 3 inches in and the blade ran out. Needed a circular saw to finish. Know your use case before buying.

commonComplaints.title: Orbital position 3 eats blades fast…
commonComplaints.body: Went through three blades in an afternoon on aggressive framing cuts in position 3. Walk back to position 2 for anything longer than a rough cut and your blades last much longer.

verdict: The DCS331B is a capable cordless jigsaw that earns its spot in any 20V MAX toolkit. Cast aluminum shoe, tool-free blade change, and four orbital settings give it the versatility to handle finish trim work and rough framing cuts. The tool-only sale format means it's best suited as a platform add-on for existing DEWALT 20V MAX users; newcomers should factor in battery cost or look at the combo kit.

realBuyers.quote: Cut out a sink hole in a granite-look laminate countertop. Position 1, slow speed, the right blade — came out perfectly. No chips, no cracks.
I use this for rough framing cuts in studs and blocking. Position 3, fast blade, done in seconds. My old corded jigsaw is gathering dust.
The cast shoe and four orbital settings make this more versatile than the cheap jigsaws I've used before. Worth the extra $50 over the budget brands.
My battery from my DEWALT drill and circular saw works right in it. Grabbed it from the shelf at lunchtime and it was cutting by 1pm. No fuss.

sources.title: DEWALT DCS331B Review — Pro Tool Reviews

metaDescription: DEWALT DCS331B 20V MAX cordless jigsaw review for Canada. 4 orbital settings, cast aluminum shoe, tool-free blade change. Tool only — no battery. ~$199 CAD.
introText: The DEWALT DCS331B is a 20V MAX cordless jigsaw with four-position orbital action and a cast aluminum shoe, sold as a tool-only unit for existing platform users. Available on Amazon.ca (ASIN B00IJ0ALNK) at around $199 CAD.
